resultList.plgdtldesc: This sophisticated 2 BHK apartment in New Ranip presents a premier residential opportunity within the rapidly developing northern corridor of Ahmedabad. Situated in the esteemed Rajshree Green Park project, this residence encompasses a generous super built-up area of 1305 sq. ft. The property is currently under construction with possession scheduled for December 2028, offering a modern living environment tailored for families and professionals alike. This east-facing unit is strategically positioned to receive ample natural light, ensuring a bright and welcoming atmosphere throughout the day.Property SpecificationsThe apartment is designed with a focus on space efficiency and contemporary aesthetics, featuring high-quality vitrified flooring that adds a touch of elegance to every room. The layout includes two spacious bedrooms and two well-appointed bathrooms, complemented by a private balcony that offers pleasant views of the surrounding garden and park area. An additional store room is integrated into the plan, providing essential utility space for organised living. Being a corner property, the unit benefits from enhanced privacy and superior cross-ventilation, making the living spaces feel airy and comfortable.FacilitiesResidents of this gated society will have access to a comprehensive suite of modern amenities designed to enhance their lifestyle. The project includes a well-equipped fitness centre and gym, a dedicated club house, and a safe children's play area. Essential services are robust, featuring 24x7 water supply from both municipal and borewell sources, partial power backup, and a dedicated security cabin for round-the-clock safety. The building is serviced by high-speed lifts and provides one covered parking space for the unit. Further facilities include solid waste management, rain water harvesting, and piped gas connectivity.LocalityLocated in the vibrant neighbourhood of New Ranip, the property enjoys excellent connectivity to the rest of Ahmedabad via the SG Highway and the nearby Vadaj Metro Station. The locality is well-served by reputable educational institutions such as Nest Public School and Arpan Education High School, as well as healthcare facilities like KD Hospital and Shivam Multispecialty Hospital. Daily shopping needs are easily met with DMart and several local markets in the immediate vicinity, while Arved Transcube Plaza and 4D Square Mall provide ample retail and entertainment options. The area is also conveniently positioned just 12 km from the Ahmedabad International Airport.

resultList.plgdtldesc: Property DetailsThis ready to move apartment is located on Bopal Shilaj Road in Ahmedabad, within the well established Pari Sarat project. The property offers a super built up area of 1786 sqft and is ideal for families seeking a spacious home in a prime residential corridor. Positioned in a developed neighborhood, the apartment enjoys views of both the garden or park and the main road, adding to its appeal and livability.Property SpecificationsThe apartment features 3 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, and 1 balcony, providing a well balanced layout for comfortable living. It is unfurnished, allowing buyers the flexibility to design interiors according to their preferences. The living cum dining area is spacious and well planned, ensuring good ventilation and natural light. The property includes vitrified flooring, which enhances durability and gives a clean modern finish. It is vastu compliant and has east and west facing options, which are often preferred for balanced daylight throughout the day.FacilityResidents of this apartment benefit from a range of essential facilities designed for convenience and safety. The locality offers easy access to schools, hospitals, shopping centers, and daily convenience stores. With good road networks and proximity to major residential and commercial zones, the area is suitable for families and professionals alike. Its blend of greenery and urban development makes it a desirable location for long term residential investment.
